rulings.Case Title: EST. OF HARRY E. SNOW
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Compel The Public Administrator Of The City And County Of San Francisco To Comply With The Court Order Of Oct 31, 1994 And For Any Inerest Earned On Funds
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required. the SFPA in its sur-reply admits that the funds may not have been transferred to the county treasurer, but may have been moved into a separate account managed by the HSA, and argues that even if the funds were not deposited with the treasurer, moving them out of the pooled account into the HSA account makes the request for relief moot as the Treasurer is responsible for the receipt of all money collected by the city and county.
